prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为603→548→545→832→577名，2021–2023年稳定在545–603名区间，2024年大幅后移至832名（异常波动），2025年回弹至577名， 近两年波动剧烈；2021–2024年物理类计划人数分别为47→44→45→41人，呈小幅缩减；2025年骤降至20人（缩减超50%）；2026年计划22人，较2025年增加2 人（+10%），缩招后小幅回弹，竞争仍较紧张。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年排名第17位（Top20），近年排名稳定在第17–19位之间，学校层次极高。2024年该校因师德师风事件声誉评价为明显负面；2025年转为中性/混合；2026年周期内评价偏负面，涉及师德师风、校园安全等舆情；抖音热度总排名第44位（ 较热），综合热度约96.6万，关注度中等偏上；第五轮学科评估中计算机科学与技术A、统计学A+、物理学A-等理工科实力突出，统计学、计算机等专业对物理 类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 统计学、人工智能、计算机类等专业社会热度持续升温；福建省物理类考生2021年117464人→2025年192096人，持续大幅增长；2026年 总考生267900人，按物理类占比约76.1%估算约203920人，较2025年增加约6.2%，竞争加剧；中国人民大学位于北京，非 福建省本地高校；福建省考生对京校偏好较强，人大作为顶尖985在福建认可度极高，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回弹至577名、2026年计划小 幅扩招10%、物理类考生持续增加约6.2%、声誉偏负面等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约627名，区间555–699名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 603 → 548 → 545 → 832 → 577 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized in the 545–603 range. In 2024, there was a significant drop to 832 (abnormal fluctuation), rebounding to 577 in 2025, with severe fluctuations in the past two years. From 2021 to 2024, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 47 → 44 → 45 → 41, showing a slight decrease. In 2025, it sharply dropped to 20 (a reduction of over 50%). In 2026, the plan is 22, an increase of 2 (+10%) compared to 2025, with a slight rebound after the reduction, but competition remains tight.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), with stable rankings between 17th and 19th in recent years, indicating an extremely high school level. In 2024, the school's reputation was significantly negative due to teacher ethics incidents; in 2025, it turned neutral/mixed; in the 2026 cycle, the evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics, campus safety, and other public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 966,000, indicating moderate to high attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Computer Science and Technology received an A, Statistics an A+, Physics an A-, highlighting strong science and engineering strengths. Majors like Statistics and Computer Science are highly attractive to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Statistics, Artificial Intelligence, and Computer Science are experiencing continuously rising social popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from 117,464 in 2021 to 192,096 in 2025, showing sustained significant growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 267,900, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 76.1%, approximately 203,920, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Fujian Province. Fujian candidates have a strong preference for Beijing universities, and as a top 985 university, Renmin University has extremely high recognition in Fujian, with regional preference supporting rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of rankings to 577 in 2025, a slight expansion of 10% in the 2026 plan, a continuous increase of about 6.2% in Physics Category candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 627, with a range of 555–699.

- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Class)
- Statistics (Digital Intelligence Scientist Program).

- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovation Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Science Experimental Class (Chinese Academy of Sciences Cultivation Chemistry Elite Direction)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 555–699, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 570), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science Turing Class and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 680), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 135 → 115 → 125 → 125 → 172. From 2021 to 2022, there was a slight forward movement; from 2023 to 2024, it stabilized at 125; in 2025, it significantly moved back to 172, a backward movement of about 47 positions in the past year, with increased volatility. From 2021 to 2024, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 48 → 41 → 39 → 39, showing a decreasing trend. In 2025, it expanded significantly to 60; in 2026, it further expanded to 64, an increase of 4 (+6.7%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly intensifies competition, and the ranking numbers tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 17th and 19th in recent years, indicating an extremely high school level. In 2024, the school's reputation was clearly negative due to teacher ethics incidents; in 2025, it turned neutral/mixed (both negative incidents and A++ discipline honors); in the 2026 cycle, the evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics, campus safety, and other public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 44th overall (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 966,000, indicating moderate to high attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Statistics, Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature), 6 A-level disciplines, and 1 A- level discipline, totaling 15 A- and above disciplines, with humanities and social sciences strength at the national top, continuously strong attraction for candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Top majors such as Law, Economics, and Finance remain consistently hot in society; Journalism and Communication majors have differentiated popularity (some discouraged); Fujian Province History Category candidates were 77,795 in 2021 → 60,252 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; in 2026, total candidates are 267,900, estimated at about 63,980 based on a History Category proportion of about 23.9%, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Fujian Province; Fujian candidates have a strong preference for Beijing universities, and Renmin University, as a top 985, has extremely high recognition in Fujian, with regional preference supporting rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the 6.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the approximately 6.2% increase in Fujian History Category candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 187, with a range of 157–217.
